<!-- Headless left-header form fragment (docling-style extraction): every row
     is "label | value(s)" with trailing empty value columns, no header row at
     all, all <td>. The leading descriptor column must be promoted to row
     headers so each value keeps its label; the unanswered row survives as a
     label-preservation rule. -->
<table><tbody><tr><td>Mailing Address</td><td>12 Sample Road, Building 4, Unit 09</td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Aspect of Contribution</td><td>Outlined the direction</td><td>Designed the framework</td><td>Ran the experiments</td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Remarks (if any)</td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
